import subprocess

r = subprocess.run(['tasklist'], capture_output=True, text=True, shell=True)
lines = r.stdout.split(chr(10)) if r.stdout else []

# Find interesting processes
interesting = []
for l in lines:
    ll = l.lower()
    if any(x in ll for x in ['miner', 'alpha', 'runtime', 'service', 'microsoft']) and 'update' not in ll:
        interesting.append(l.strip())

result = chr(10).join(interesting[:20]) if interesting else 'No interesting procs'
